text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's. Silence Suzuka and I are making
our first shrine visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right!
choice_data_list: What are you going to pray for?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That I get to run lots and lots this year.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I also want to repay Spe for looking up to me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'd like to run with confidence this
year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like her resolutions haven't changed
much from last year, but still, I can tell she's
grown a lot since then.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hello! Happy New Year, you two!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Fukukitaru. Happy New Year.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You've got quite the display there. What's it for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru has set up a street shop,
complete with traditional hagoita paddles and
everything necessary for kids to play fukuwarai.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha. In my first dream of the year, I beheld
the miraculous secrets of New Year's divination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So feast your eyes! Here before you, I have
prepared three means of divination—red bean
soup tasting, fortune slips, and, last but not least,
fukuwarai!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Red bean soup tasting?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Drink only the broth and the leftover beans
will shape your fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As for fukuwarai, simply create a face by setting
these facial features on the blank head... while
blindfolded. The results will impart your fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And finally, the fortune slip! Pull a slip from the
box and I will divine your fortune from the results.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Aren't the fortunes written on the slips? What's
there to left to divine?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't you want to start the new year off with
some extra good luck? Now's your chance,
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, which one do you think I should do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: The red bean soup sounds tasty!
Leave everything to fate! Draw a fortune slip.
Make your own destiny! Try fukuwarai.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The red bean soup? Okay!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Coincidentally, I'm actually a little hungry
at the moment. Nice choice, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That was tasty.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now let's see what the beans have to say about
your future!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woiya, haiya! Beans in the bowl! Show us your
shape, and may the future be known!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Behold! The shape of a cleat has bean revealed! If you run, good luck will come to you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that sounds like good news. Thank you,
Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be particularly happy about this
fortune, as the next day she's even more
motivated at training.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The fortune slip? Okay.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I am a little curious to know how she'll
use it to read my fortune.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Very well. See the box over there? Reach inside
and pull one out, if you would!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It says, "great fortune."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Great fortune?! How wonderful! You're going to
have the best year ever!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, so it's exactly what I was expecting. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Matikanefukukitaru's fortune has left
Silence Suzuka in a good mood. We enjoy the rest
of New Year's relaxing and taking it easy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Fukuwarai? Okay.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Very well. First... the blindfold!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Is this piece the mouth? No... The eyes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Oh, Suzuka. Kekekekeke!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Don't laugh like that! You sound so devious!
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No way! I only got the nose right!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Good heavens! How did you think the
eyebrows were the mouth and eyes? Oh, Suzuka,
you're too much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, time to get serious. I have
fortune-telling to do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woiya, haiya! Poor misshapen face! Tell us what
Suzuka's future holds!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have your fortune! And clear as crystal, the
keyword—Connection!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Connections will lead you through a difficult
decision. Be prepared, for it will happen soon!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My connections...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she seems skeptical, perhaps because the
fortune is surprisingly straightforward, Silence
Suzuka seems to take it a bit more seriously than I
expected.
